docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHANIUZD, ALI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALI GHANIUZD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT TURO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TODD ARMSTRONG, SENIOR LEGAL SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM MAILED TO ALI GHANIUZD-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHANIUZD, ALI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GHANIUZD, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GHANIUZD, ALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO INC $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUL-13-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT TURO INC
